text: Did Barkley really just insinuate that Iowa St. shouldn't have made the tournament??
Fair to say that 11 teams from the PAC-12 have a realistic chance to make the #fieldof68 at this point - will probably get 6-8 bids

Walton: Are you willing to try something every day that scares you, Bud?
Sciambi: I've been sitting next to you for three days.
If only Mark Price could suit up to shoot over the Syracuse zone. Total blowout
Eleanor Roosevelt quote in first minute. Only Bill Walton could make St. John's-Chaminade watchable.
How did Charlotte get in the Battle 4 Atlantis? One of the worst teams in a now perennially one-bid league.
Zags are such an interesting team this season. A++ frontcourt but question marks in backcourt. NCAA matchups will be key.
Jordan Woodard with a huge three for OU - looks like they may escape with the win in Memphis
Memphis looking for big early win against Oklahoma. Tigers lead 74-73 with two minutes to go.
Xavier-Mizzou tonight is an interesting matchup. Tigers much better than expected in wins over Wofford and UMES. Xavier favored.
Make or break season for Josh Pastner at Memphis? Or have expectations normalized from Calipari era?
So if I've kept up on all this right the "new Big East" has Marquette & Creighton left and the "old Big East" has Temple?
My Waltonesque tweet of the day: This West Regional could go down as one of the weakest regionals ever.
Suddenly Ohio State(??) is a final four favorite...right?
Gregg Marshall deserves much respect for leading Wichita St to Sweet 16 in a "transition" year for the program.
Consider me not shocked. Zags were most vulnerable 1 seed. Not Few's fault but weak conference doesn't prep them well for tourney grind.
Really liking my prediction of yesterday: All Big Ten final four. That conference is on a different level. Louisville may spoil it though.
Roosevelt Jones free throws forthcoming. Good times!
Marquette playing with more urgency this half. I like them to pull this one out.
Regardless of loss today that was a SLU team Rick Majerus would have been proud of. Great season.
Gregg Marshall doesn't get mentioned enough as one of the best coaches in the country. Just wins. #WichitaState
The committee actually did Oregon a favor giving them a 12. Easier draw + extra motivation. Dominant performance today. #MarchMadness
No truth to the rumor that Mark Few was suffering from kennel cough. Sorry couldn't resist.
I don't see FGCU getting schooled the way Harvard is. Eagles are a better team.
Really impressed with Michigan & Michigan State today. They looked dominant. Final Four contenders.
Pretty predictable start to Zona-Harvard. Doubt Crimson can make this one a game.
Wish Bill Walton was calling this UCLA game...that would be epic.
Conference pride on the line in Philly. Will Big 12 or Mountain West be biggest bust of the tournament?
This doesn't feel like a fluke. Florida Gulf Coast was the better team tonight. Absolutely why I love #MarchMadness
Suddenly Georgetown can't miss.
FGCU just not built to run clock. Have a feeling this gets really interesting. #MarchMadness
This is the only 2-15 game I can remember where the 15 could win a 7-game series. #Georgetown #FGCU #MarchMadness
FGCU style of play means Georgetown could still win this game. #MarchMadness
A-Sun is for real. Mercer beat Tennessee in Knoxville in NIT. FGCU taking it to Georgetown! #MarchMadness
I would like John Groce to coach my team. Winner. #Illini #MarchMadness
Big 12 is off to a terrible start in #MarchMadness overrated league it would seem
I swear this is the last time I EVER pick Belmont again. They get me every year! #MarchMadness
Long, long way to go, but I would not be shocked to see an all Big Ten final four. #MarchMadness
Lack of upsets today means very juicy matchups Saturday. #MarchMadness
Flagrant foul reviews are killing college basketball. Absolutely terrible to watch
Butler's guards aren't quick enough to handle the VCU pressure. Total romp so far for the Rams.
Alabama hanging tough first half in Gainesville. Tide could move into some brackets with road upset.
Horned Frogs!!
Never under taking a 3 when a 2 wins the game. Closer shots are easier to make people... #hawkeyes
Love Bill Walton. Fate of the known world is always in the balance with him.
Surely Bill Walton knows that you cannot diss Dickie V on ESPN! #sacrilege
You can't lose to TCU and still be a #1 seed, right?
Life cannot be easy growing up with a name like Rob Chubb.
Earnest Ross with 9 early points against his old team. #Mizzou
Frank Haith's halftime speeches >>>>>> Frank Haith's pregame speeches #Mizzou
That SC team that scored 10 1st half points in Gainesville led Mizzou by 15 at the half in Columbia. SEC domination by Gators.
Scott Drew ends game flat on his back! #baylor
Is there another top 20 team without a road win? #Mizzou
This Mizzou team still hasn't figured out how to play on the road. Dreadful start in Baton Rouge.
Miami-FSU refs really need to swallow their whistles. Major foul fest. #ACC
Minnesota certainly playing at Wisconsin's pace. 16-11 6:36 left in 1st half
I am never surprised by conference road losses. Just about any team can win a few at home. #ncaab
I would love to reduce the number of timeouts in college basketball. And why do we need a TV timeout on first called TO of 2nd half? $$$
Walton: the way Howland calls timeouts excessively... Getting awkward. #ucla
Play-by-play guy tells Bill Walton he is trending on twitter. Walton: I care about everything...and I am loyal.
Calipari will have #UK in the title hunt by March, but there will be bumps in the road.
Love honoring the military, but surely last night will be the end of these onboard, outdoor #ncaab games. Awkward situations all around.
Cardinals!!!!!!
Watching college football today makes me miss college hoops! 70-63? 51-44? And Texas-Okie St well on its way.
Matt Painter for the second straight year is my least favorite coach in America. Stop getting my hopes up. #Angrymizzoutweet
No scientific evidence to back this up but I'm relatively certain as soon as I start watching KU they will come back and win. Staying away.
Is there anyone in the stands in Greensboro? Pathetic looking crowd on TV. #MarchMadness
Can Robbie Hummel almost single-handedly lead Purdue to upset over Kansas? 22 of team's 36 in 1st half. #MarchMadness
@chrisskreager Absolutely. But they managed to mess it up last year by losing to VCU when they looked like the clear favorite.
KU road to final four right now is Purdue tonight, bubble team NC State, and very likely Marshall-less UNC. Can Bill Self mess that up?
Uh-oh...Kendall Marshall wrist injury puts Heels march to NOLA in major jeopardy. Break for KU? #MarchMadness

All four number one seeds march on to Sweet 16. Kentucky & North Carolina look to be marching toward finals. #MarchMadness
USF sure gets after it on the defensive end. Love that intensity. The offense....well...not so much. #USF
So this is what Norfolk St looks like when the other team actually plays defense. Not pretty. #MarchMadness
We're seeing very early that Billy Donovan is much more well-prepared for Norfolk St than Frank Haith was. #MarchMadness
Green won't let Spartans lose. Powerful leader with will to win. #MSU
Gotta change that lane violation rule college basketball. And also why has it not been called all year until the tournament? Bizarre.
Ratliffe & Moore getting worked on the inside. Embarrassing 20 minutes especially on defensive end for Mizzou.
If Creighton doesn't come back vs Alabama we will have 4 total higher seeds losing: 2 from the #MWC and 2 from the #MVC
And New Mexico is now the only #MWC team left in the tournament.
#MVC is not acquitting itself particularly well so far. Wichita St loss yesterday and Creighton outplayed by Bama so far today.
Cincinnati's poor free throw shooting only comes into play if Texas fouls of course. Terrible strategy there Rick Barnes. #MarchMadness
Cincinnati is a terrible free throw shooting team so this one isn't over yet. #MarchMadness
Didn't see this Texas comeback coming at all. Should be an exciting finish. #MarchMadness
For best #MarchMadness tweeting #FF @raphiellej @RobDauster @AndyGlockner @DanWolken @jeffborzello @MattNorlander @nicoleauerbach
Texas really needed to cut into Cincy lead by first media TO, instead Bearcats extend to 17-point margin. Curtains for UT. #MarchMadness
Hard to imagine a worse start for Texas. Absolutely cannot buy a bucket. Looking totally dreadful. #MarchMadness
First four games today should all be very competitive and I can easily see myself going 0-4. FWIW I've got Cincy, NC St, Creighton & UF.
Who do they think they're fooling? RT @DaveBorges: Drummond, Lamb say they haven't thought about whether they'll turn pro. #UConn
After a perfect afternoon, I missed half the games tonight (if CU holds on). Good news is that I haven't lost a Sweet 16 team yet. #bracket
Colorado salvaging #pac12 respectability with dominating performance vs UNLV. #MarchMadness
One benefit to so many favorites rolling today is the great matchups we'll see Saturday: Wis-Vandy, Cuse-K St, Murray-Marquette...
#UConn & W. Virginia losses along w/ Syracuse near loss have done nothing to dissuade me from thinking the #BigEast is overrated as usual.
When you think about where Indiana was the last few years and where they are now, you've got to give it up to Tom Crean. #iubb
Lesson from today: higher seeds are higher seeds for a reason...they are consistently better than a lower seeded team. #MarchMadness
VCU...wow. Following up last year's wild run with another #MarchMadness win today. Blank check to Shaka Smart at any school w/ opening.
Higher seeds dominating Day 1 of #MarchMadness w/ 12-seed VCU only lower seed claiming a win. 11-seed Colorado looking strong though.
Good #MarchMadness start for the #Big12 heading toward 3-0 w/ wins by Baylor, Kansas St & (momentarily) Iowa St.
Pathetic effort by #UConn but not surprising from this underachieving bunch. Lack spark w/o Kemba. See you in 2014 tourney if then.
